policy.single_chip: Single-chip bringup (n150/p150) requires runtime_chip_count==1 on a dedicated host. Do not run on n300-llmbox / qb / galaxy / lb fabric — TT_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 is not valid bringup.
policy.multichip: Multichip: mesh uses runtime_chip_count (XLA). TT_VISIBLE_DEVICES uses visible_board_count (tt-smi resettable boards). On n300 llmbox often chip_count=8, TT_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0,1,2,3.
